evidence_summary: Establish the passage of time, the difficulty of the journey, and the growing tension of being hunted.
John Carter, Dejah Thoris, and Sola travel stealthily for twenty days across sea bottoms and canals, moving under the cover of darkness to evade Martian patrols.
Exhaustion/Tension $\rightarrow$ Relief (at reaching safety) $\rightarrow$ Apprehension (approaching the city).
Wide landscape shots of the Martian terrain
medium tracking shots of the trio moving through shadows
